instruction: Help me record the key market data into the memo

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Market Insights Brief
Report Period: 2025 Q1
Industry Total Size: Estimated 850B CNY
Industry Growth: 15.3% YoY
Key Trend: AI-powered industry consolidation, dominant players strengthening
Competitive Landscape: Top 5 hold 62% market share, up 4 percentage points YoY
Our Market Share: 3.2%, up 0.5 percentage points YoY
Opportunity: Rapid growth in SME digital demand
Threat: Cross-industry competition from emerging platforms' > /home/user/Desktop/market_insights.txt

phases.instruction: Help me record the key market data into the memo
Extract the industry size and growth rate from /home/user/Desktop/market_insights.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/market_memo.txt: '2025 Q1 Industry Size: ~850B CNY, 15.3% YoY growth', save
